meta.release_notes:
# Changelog
All notable changes to this model will be documented in this file.

## [Unreleased]
- Version 2.0.0 of model is deprecated. It has a wrong regex for BPNS validation from the old shared model for BPNS trait.

## [4.0.0] - 2025-07-07
A conversion table from previous version 3.0.0 to 4.0.0 of this model is provided with the updated KIT Quality Management for CX release Saturn.

### Added
- model feature additionalInformation key:value pair added
- vehicles_transmissions entity added

### Changed
- to reduce redundancies in modelling some properties are now used form share quality core model
- using parts definition from shared quality core model (via samm:extends) to unify previous components list
- at least one primary identifier per entity is now mandatory
- vehicles_soldDate is now mandatory properties

### Removed
- vehicles_components: replaced by vehicles_parts


## [3.0.0] - 2024-04-29
### Added
- Added optional property components: to be able to store focus components in the semantic model as requested by BMW

### Changed


### Removed

## [2.1.0] - 2024-02-19 -> deprecated
### Added

### Changed
- reference to shared aspect model for BPNS was changed to latest version

### Removed


## [2.0.0] - 2024-01-22 -> deprecated
### Added
- metaInformation added to root entity: Gives data consumer necessary information how data provider created this data set
- integration of shared UUID characteristic and RegEx for the vehicle Catena-X identifier
- introducing new characteristic to mark unique identifiers
- integration of separate aspect model Vehicle.ProductDescription:3.0.0 into this model to do necessary adaptions that were decided in Catena-X Quality use case team: Most of the properties should be set to optional

### Changed
- changed all properties to optional except one unique identifier per entity
- properties that were linked to OEM entity are now one level up 
- fuel type property now linked to engine property
- entity production was renamed to productionPlant to increase clarity

### Removed
- link to Vehicle.ProductDescription:3.0.0: Previous linked model now integrated and adapted
Streamlining of aspect model:
- remove of body entity + body properties as it was never used
- remove of all KBA properties: Focusing on NHTSA properties only 
- remove of oem entity: Properties now located on vehicle level
- remove of fuel entity: Properties now located on vehicle and engines level
- remove of sale entity: Properties now located on vehicle level
- remove of production entity: Properties now located on vehicle level

## [1.0.0] - 2023-05-15 -> deprecated
### Added
- initial version of this model

### Changed
n/a

### Removed

nodes.label: Vehicles
nodes.description: This aspect model was created in the Catena-X use case quality. The purpose of this aspect model is to transfer general information of a list/fleet of vehicles - primarily how the vehicles are equipped, when they were built and which engines are installed.

nodes.label: listOfVehicles
nodes.description: List of Vehicle.ProductDescription

nodes.label: metaInformation
nodes.description: This meta information is valid for all entries in this data set. The meta information is used to tell the data consumer which selection criteria were applied by the data provider.

nodes.label: recordStatus
nodes.description:
The record operation enumeration can be used to realize delta update concept.
Delta update concept means:
- You transfer an initial load of data
- After the first week only the delta to the initial load is transferred


The record status describes whether this record is:
- new=>This record is transferred the first time
- update=> Some properties of this record have changed compared to a previous transfer
- delete=> This record was transferred in the initial load or in a previous delta update, but is not used any more and therefore it should be deleted on data consumer side
- same=> This record was transferred in the initial load or in a previous delta update

nodes.label: anonymizedVin
nodes.description: OEM-specific hashed VIN; link to car data over pseydomized/hashed VIN or Catena-X unique digital twin identifier.

nodes.label: catenaXVehicleId
nodes.description: A unique identifier for the vehicle in the Catena-X data space.

nodes.label: class
nodes.description: Class of the vehicle.

nodes.label: driveSystemPower
nodes.description: Complete power of this vehicle in KW. This sums up the power of each individual engine installed in this vehicle.

nodes.label: driveType
nodes.description: Drive type of a vehicle according enumeration.

nodes.label: powerTrainType
nodes.description: Describes the installed powertrain in the vehicle.

nodes.label: modelDescription
nodes.description: Detail vehicle model like "Golf VIII"

nodes.label: modelIdentifier
nodes.description: OEM-specific model identifier or OEM-specific project name.

nodes.label: plantCatenaXId
nodes.description: Unique Catena-X plant identifier, also called BPNS.

nodes.label: plantCountryCode
nodes.description: Country code of the plant, where the vehicle was produced.

nodes.label: plantDescription
nodes.description: Long name of the production plant of the vehicle

nodes.label: plantIdentifier
nodes.description: Plant id of the final assembly of the vehicle

nodes.label: productionDate
nodes.description: Production date of the vehicle

nodes.label: softwareCategory
nodes.description:
Some OEMs bring in the software as complete package for all systems:
To identify this software: software category and software version is needed.
Software category when this car was built.

nodes.label: softwareVersion
nodes.description:
Some OEMs brings in the software as complete package for all systems:
To identify this software: software category and software version is needed.
Software version when this car was built
.

nodes.label: soldCountryCode
nodes.description: The country code in 3 letter format where this vehicle was sold.

nodes.label: soldCountryGroup
nodes.description: The region where this car was sold.

nodes.label: soldDate
nodes.description: Sold date of the vehicle = warranty start date for this vehicle

nodes.label: steeringPos
nodes.description: Position of vehicle steering wheel, Left or right.

nodes.label: vehicleSeries
nodes.description: vehicle series, normally one level above model. E.g. vehicle series ="Golf", vehicle model="Golf VIII"

nodes.label: wmiCode
nodes.description: The world manufacturer index are the first 3 letters of the VIN. IT describes a code for the vehicle manufacturer. Also see the description from NTHSA.

nodes.label: wmiNameNHTSA
nodes.description: Name of the vehicle manufacturer according NHTSA: use https://vpic.nhtsa.dot.gov/api/vehicles/decodewmi/WVW?format=json - entry to be used is CommonName.

nodes.label: engines
nodes.description: List of installed engines in the vehicle.

nodes.label: equipments
nodes.description: Equipments.

nodes.label: selectionCriteria
nodes.description: Describes the selection criteria a Catena-X data provider has applied to create this data set.

nodes.label: selectionStart
nodes.description: Describes the starting point for providing records in this data set.

nodes.label: selectionEnd
nodes.description: Describes the end point for providing records in this data set.

nodes.label: engineId
nodes.description: OEM-specific identifier/type of the installed engine

nodes.label: engineDescription
nodes.description: Description of the engine

nodes.label: engineSeries
nodes.description: Engine series as defined by OEM

nodes.label: serialNumber
nodes.description: Serial number of the installed engine

nodes.label: size
nodes.description: Cubic capacity in a combustion engine  - not available in battery-electric vehicles

nodes.label: power
nodes.description: Engine power is the power that an engine can put out

nodes.label: engineProductionDate
nodes.description: Date when the engine was produced

nodes.label: installDate
nodes.description: Date when the engine was installed

nodes.label: nhtsaFuelType
nodes.description: Description of the fuel according US NHTSA

nodes.label: equipmentIdentifier
nodes.description: The identifier of a specific equipment.

nodes.label: equipmentDescription
nodes.description: The equipment variants description.

nodes.label: group
nodes.description: Bundels all equipment-oriented information into categories like Interior

nodes.label: VehiclesList
nodes.description: List of vehicles

nodes.label: EnginesList
nodes.description: A list of all installed engines in the vehicle

nodes.label: EquipmentsList
nodes.description: List of equipments installed in the vehicle.

nodes.label: MetaCharacteristic
nodes.description: Characteristic for the meta information.

nodes.label: UniqueID
nodes.description: This Characteristic describes a property that is truly unique either inside the Company that is providing the data or even in Catena-X dataspace. Only one property in a semantic entity should be a uniqueID. Unique ids can be used to link a data set with other semantic models.

nodes.label: CountryCodeCharacteristic
nodes.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 ? three-letter country codes

nodes.label: Vehicle
nodes.description: Vehicle data that does not fit into one of the other entities.

nodes.label: MetaInformation
nodes.description: This entity groups all meta information properties. Meta information properties give hints for a Catena-X data consumer to better understand, how this data set was created on the Catena-X data provider side.

nodes.label: Engine
nodes.description: Describing one installed engine

nodes.label: Equipment
nodes.description: One equipment of the vehicle.

nodes.label: RecordStatusEnumeration
nodes.description: Defining the enumeration for the record status

nodes.label: DriveTypeNHTSA
nodes.description: Enumeration of drive type according NHTSA, table [vPICList_lite].[dbo].[DriveType]

nodes.label: PowerTrainTypes
nodes.description: This enumeration comes from NHTSA (US authority) database. Table [vPICList_lite].[dbo].[ElectrificationLevel] extended by Gasoline and Diesel as entry.

nodes.label: VehicleSteeringPos
nodes.description: Vehicle steering position enumeration from NHTSA, see table [vPICList_lite].[dbo].[Steering]

nodes.label: FuelTypesNHTSA
nodes.description: Enumeration from NHTSA vpic database, table [vPICList_lite].[dbo].[FuelType]

nodes.label: EnginePower
nodes.description: Engine power expressed in kilowatt.

nodes.label: CubicCapacity
nodes.description: Cubic capacity of the engine

nodes.label: CountryCodeRegularExpression
nodes.description: Regular Expression that ensures a three-letter code

nodes.label: WorldManufacturerInformationCodeLength
nodes.description: Restricts the length of wmiCode to exactly 3 chars.
